title: Idyllon
description: Resource pack for Minecraft using a simple style and a limited color palette.
body:
Minecraft resource pack in a simplistic style, utilizing a palette similar to other packs such as Dandelion/Dandelion X. 

Notable features:
- _Aether support_
- _BetterEnd support_
- _Terralith, Incendium, and Nullscape-exclusive textures/features_
- _Custom entity textures/models_
- _Biome-dependent entity textures_
- _Connected textures_
- _Custom block models (present in Vanilla)_
- _LabPBR compatibility (e.g., normalmaps & specular maps)_
- _Looks pretty :)_
